LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PRO IS, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH AND IN THE ALTERNATIVE, DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING TO REFLECT THE CORRECT MOVING PARTY, PRO IS, INC. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 25, 2012 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO CONDUCT JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY REGARDING MINIMUM CONTACTS AND POTENTIAL SUCCESSOR LIABILITY. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS ARE DUE SEPTEMBER 10, 2012 AND SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY PAPERS ARE DUE SEPTEMBER 18, 2012. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Quash And In The Alternative, Demurrer To The Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Quash And In The Alternative, Demurrer To The Amended Complaint is off calendar. A Notice of Removal was filed July 18, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Continued To Oct-31-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION TO ADMIT CHRISTOPHER LAFON COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Granted. No opposition filed and Mr. Lafon's application satisfies the requirements of CRC 9.40. The court signed the Order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION TO ADMIT TONY CAROZZA COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Granted. No opposition filed and Mr. Carozza's application satisfies the requirements of CRC 9.40. The court signed the Order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Notice Of Motion To Quash And In The Alternative, Demurrer To The Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Sep-25-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRO IS, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH AND IN THE ALTERNATIVE, DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Henry M. Su of Yaron & Associates (658.2929) for defendant and moving party; David Poore of Brown Poore LLP (925.943.1166) for plaintiff and responding party.
Discussed and the court modified its ruling to reflect the correct moving party, Pro Is, Inc. The matter is continued to September 25, 2012 to allow Plaintiff to conduct jurisdictional discovery regarding minimum contacts and potential successor liability. Supplemental opposition papers are due September 10, 2012 and supplemental reply papers are due September 18, 2012. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Notice Of Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WALSHIRE ASSURANCE CO.'S MOTION TO QUASH.
Appearances: Henry M. Su of Yaron & Associates (658.2929) for defendant and moving party; David Poore of Brown Poore LLP (925.943.1166) for plaintiff and responding party.
This matter was not argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. The exercise of jurisdiction over this Defendant is proper under Empire Steel Corp. v. Superior Court, (1961) 56 Cal.2d 823, 832-33. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Notice Of Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRO INSURANCE SOLUTION LIMITED'S MOTION TO QUASH.
Appearances: Henry M. Su of Yaron & Associates (658.2929) for defendant and moving party; David Poore of Brown Poore LLP (925.943.1166) for plaintiff and responding party.
This matter was not argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Service on this defendant was defective. Service on an entity located outside the United States must be effectuated in accordance with Code of Civil Procedure 413.10(c) and the Hague Convention. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Scott A. Brown of Brown Poore LLP (925.943.1166) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled. Plaintiff pleads the terms of the contract according to its legal intendment and effect. A liberal and fair reading of the complaint indicates that the contract, an insurance policy, was in writing. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
